remarks: Spacious 980 sqft one bedroom above O'Neills (on third floor) in the heart of SoNo. Large living room with cathedral ceilings. Granite/stainless steel modern kitchen. Washer/Dryer, storage room and 1 garage parking space, Central air, Hardwood floors and many windows! A real SoNo Gem! Steps to SoNo Collection Mall, movie theater, shops, restaurants, mall, river and the South Norwalk Train Station. Elevator building.
